activities.title: Verify Token Freshness
activities.description: Check auth status. If token stale or expired, trigger A26 (refresh) before proceeding. If refresh fails, abort with auth error.

activities.title: Send HTTP Request
activities.description: Execute libcurl HTTPS POST with assembled headers, body, and URL. Set streaming write callback. Configure TLS, timeouts, retries.

activities.title: Parse SSE Event Stream
activities.description: Buffer incoming bytes, split on double-newline boundaries, extract event: type and data: JSON. Handle multi-line data fields. Dispatch to event handler.

activities.title: Strip Response Protocol Artifacts
activities.description: Remove mcp_ prefix from tool names in response events (content_block_start, content_block_delta with tool_use type). Buffer incomplete lines to handle chunk boundaries.

activities.title: Deliver Structured Events
activities.description: Map Anthropic event types to claude_event_t enum values. Extract text deltas, tool_use deltas, thinking blocks. Extract usage from message_delta. Invoke host callback.

activities.title: Handle Transport Errors
activities.description: Classify errors: rate_limit (429) → backoff retry, unauthorized (401) → trigger refresh, server_error (500+) → retry with limit, context_length (400) → report, timeout → report.
